description: Letter from Makārim b. Yūsuf to the sons of Merayot ha-Kohen, who seem to be the tax farmers of Shubrā. In Judaeo-Arabic with the address in both Judaeo-Arabic (in a different hand from the letter) and in Arabic script. He complains that not only have the two months granted for the delay of payment passed, but five additional months as well. They have made him fall behind on his obligations to others. The deal has to do with silk. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: מכתב ממכארם בן יוסף לבני מריות הכהן, חוכרי מס שובראה; ביהודית-ערבית; מתלונן שחמישה חודשים עברו מעבר לזמן שניתן לו; הסכם קשור למשי
